title: 亚马逊、英伟达和AMD向AI初创公司Odyssey投资3.1亿美元，用于构建3D世界模型
full_text:
Amazon, Nvidia, and AMD bet $310 million on AI startup building 3D world models
Amazon, Nvidia, and AMD bet $310 million on AI startup building 3D world models
Amazon, Nvidia, and AMD are putting $310 million into world model startup Odyssey ML, now valued at $1.45 billion. CIA-linked fund IQT and Google chief scientist Jeff Dean are also backing the round. World models are shaping up to be the next big AI bet after pure language models.
Amazon, Nvidia, and AMD are putting $310 million into world model startup Odyssey ML, now valued at $1.45 billion. CIA-linked fund IQT and Google chief scientist Jeff Dean are also backing the round. World models are shaping up to be the next big AI bet after pure language models.
AI, Menschen, Wirtschaft
AI, Menschen, Wirtschaft

discovery_record.discovery_title: 亚马逊、英伟达和AMD向AI初创公司Odyssey投资3.1亿美元，用于构建3D世界模型
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 亚马逊、英伟达和AMD的风险投资部门向AI初创公司Odyssey ML投资3.1亿美元，该公司致力于构建模拟物理世界的3D世界模型。本轮融资后估值14.5亿美元，其他投资者包括CIA关联基金IQT、GV（前谷歌风投）、谷歌首席科学家Jeff Dean和投资人Elad Gil。Odyssey使用AWS作为首选云服务商并运行在亚马逊Trainium芯片上。创始人Oliver Cameron和Jeff Hawke来自自动驾驶领域，团队55人分布在伦敦、苏黎世和帕洛阿尔托。世界模型被视为继纯语言模型之后的下一个重大方向，旨在模拟物理、动力学和空间关系。
